title: Enai Sudum Pani
overview: Women are going missing in Pollachi and police have shirked their responsibility to catch the criminal. Vetri and Aparna are neighbours and have been in love since childhood. She is a responsible adult, with her own business, and he is a fun loving young man, with the ambition to become an IPS officer. A dead body is discovered and the parents of the dead woman.
